title: Personal Data Protection Code of Practice for the Education Sector
summary: This Code applies to private higher educational institutions, private schools, and language centres. It focuses on the protection of student records, parent information, and academic transcripts.

provisions.title: Student & Parent Consent
provisions.content: Institutions must obtain explicit consent for the processing of student data, particularly for minors where parental consent is mandatory.

provisions.title: Retention of Academic Records
provisions.content: Academic transcripts and certificates must be retained indefinitely or for long-term periods as required by the Ministry of Higher Education.
